planSteps.description: Log in with valid credentials and wait for the dashboard to finish loading
Navigate directly to the /app/eureka route and wait for the page to finish loading

Verify the page shows the 'Eureka!' heading and, below it, a 'Discover connections' button (the empty state for an account with no connections yet). Finding the heading with that button, or already-rendered connection cards, means PASS; a 404 or blank page means FAIL.
